name: buildy
description: Create, update, and inspect Buildy-hosted interactive web apps from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Build and iterate hosted web apps
interface.longDescription: Buildy is an MCP server that generates, hosts, and updates small interactive web apps. Use this plugin to connect the Buildy MCP endpoint and follow the Buildy authoring workflow from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Build me a personal web app with Buildy.
Update my Buildy app from feedback.
Connect Buildy MCP in this Codex session.
